projects: Working in the ETL squad of the Data Service team. We work to maintain databases and convert data to a usable table structure from source. We work with databases like Postgres, Snowflake, Firebolt etc. It's a good opportunity to work with a team of experienced engineers and learn from them.
Received a standing ovation for an internal presentation on ETL improvements; recognized by leadership for impact.

positions.description: This was a business data analytics project — it was about categorizing customer narrations at the time of transactions and analyzing the behaviour of customers based on the categorization. It was done using unsupervised learning algorithms and NLP.
